diagrams.title: ER Diagram Notation for Weak Entity
diagrams.description: Shows how weak entities are represented in ER diagrams with all standard notations

diagrams.title: EMPLOYEE-DEPENDENT Example
diagrams.description: Complete ER diagram showing EMPLOYEE (strong) and DEPENDENT (weak) with identifying relationship

elements: Composite key shown for ORDER_ITEM: (order_id + item_number)

diagrams.title: Strong vs Weak Entity Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of entity types with visual differences
elements: Primary key vs Partial key notation
diagrams.purpose: Clear differentiation between entity types for exam preparation
